title: lichen_l2.h has transitive dependency on lora_l2.h for MTU
description: lichen_l2.h:29,48 — Header includes lora_l2.h solely to define LICHEN_L2_MTU as LICHEN_LORA_MTU. Consumers pull in lora_l2.h types even if only needing L2 interface types.
close_reason: Defined LICHEN_L2_MTU directly as 200, removed transitive include of lora_l2.h
